blocks.content: Derek Pruitt had a big mouth. Kit had always known this and had chosen to forget it.
By Monday morning the thing on the water tower had moved through conversations Kit wasn't in. Eli appeared at his locker before homeroom with an expression that said he already knew everything.
The bell rang. They went to homeroom. Kit sat down next to Daisy and she said hey and he couldn't tell anything from her face except that she had her notebook open.
He told himself she probably didn't know yet.
He told himself he would tell her himself. Today. Before she heard it somewhere else.
